_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Programming and build (frontend developer) involves advising on the right way to apply standards and methods to ensure compliance; provide technical advice to stakeholders and set team-based standards for programming tools and techniques; collaborate with others when required to review specifications; using specifications to build, test and document user interfaces of high complexity, using the appropriate standards and tools.
reference_document_element_description: Design and build LLM-based application systems, including system prompt design, tool integration, retrieval pipeline, output validation, and failure mode documentation.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-008 (AI, cosine: 0.433), OP-T-001 (OP, cosine: 0.428).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.460). Shared vocabulary: [based, build]. DDaT-only terms [advice, advising, apply, appropriate, collaborate, complexity] vs WIDAI-only terms [application, design, documentation, failure, integration, llm] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.849 (P=0.840, R=0.857). Balanced P/R — the 59-word DDaT element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.2%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Programming and build (frontend developer) involves advising on the right way to" and "Design and build LLM-based application systems, including system prompt design,". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.494 ≈ STS 0.460 (gap 0.035). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [based, build] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.1%. Shared tokens: [based, build]. DDaT-only: [advice, advising, apply, appropriate, collaborate, complexity]. WIDAI-only: [application, design, documentation, failure, integration, llm].
